positive: A stylized, symmetrical abstract representation of a cosmic forest canopy. The scene features bioluminescent flora, intertwined with geometric circuit lines and organic, flowing ribbons of nebular light. The palette should be deep indigo, vibrant cyan, glowing magenta, and electric teal, creating a high-contrast, dreamlike contrast suitable for apparel printing. The composition should utilize strong, centralized symmetry, ensuring clean edges and readable silhouette elements. Style is a mix of neo-Art Nouveau and vaporwave aesthetic, emphasizing intricate line work and smooth gradients. Ideal for a repeating, high-impact print.
